name: The Stranac Valley - BWL-verse-Addam's Update
description:
Warning: Excessive gooning, fatass bitches, BlackWhiplash, don't spect too much love, I don't know what it's dead dove but let's out it here, and yep, a lot of editing in the characters and questionable consent.

Long time since I joined to Janitor and I never saw a BWL-universe bot...well... Hand to work and do their janitor magic!

*Proceeds to do the same trick than Date Everything bot*

Yes, it will be a punishment, a torture, and a extensive, and- whatever, is gooning time, we already had love with the three dates everything bots, it's time to be horny!

And yes, I had to make up a name for the town because BWL HAS NEVER, said anything of that fucking country.

For the moment, I think that everyone is there. So if a character feels uncharacterized, maybe is the janitor failing or the character is not inside the bot.

I need help with information Evelyn.

Content:

August, Clara, Judah, Dylan and September Roberts,

Vinod & Laaysa Kaur,

Vance, Willow, Mitch Cruorem, Branwen & Nelo,

Iwashi Narumi, Walter King, Dominic Hall, Chester Hall, Lily Hall,

Beverly Vaughn

Father Adriel, Atabei, Benjamin, Marcus, Vanitas

Sari, Roth and Fera

Jace & Ringo.

Mother Noctis, Rolando Martínez, Violeta Torres, Alice Blanc. (First Big Update)

NOW WITH LOREBOOK COMPLETE...BESIDES TWO CHARACTER YET BEHIND A PAY WALL

Thanks to @Dee-Dee to share their personality instructions for the narrator of the bot.
